name: mysql
title: MySQL
description: Popular open-source relational database with comprehensive SQL support, replication, and robust data integrity.

variables.name: MYSQL_DATABASE
variables.label: Database Name
variables.description: Default database created on first start

variables.name: MYSQL_USER
variables.label: Database User
variables.description: Optional non-root user created on first start

variables.name: MYSQL_PASSWORD
variables.label: Database Password
variables.description: Password for the optional non-root user

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Host Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for MySQL connections
